rulings.Case Title: ERIC B. UPIN ET AL VS. AMANDA A. BRYAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint Against Add A Garage, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT AMANDA BRYAN's Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint Against Add A Garage, Inc. OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE FINLEY VS. MITCHELL HUANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs MITCHELL HUANG and DEBORAH MIN's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Arbitration continued to February 1, 2018. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than January 12, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: HUI WU ET AL VS. SEAN MCKEAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant'S Memorandum Of Costs Or In The Alternative To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF HUI WU, WEI ZHANG, STEVE ZHANG, and SHUYI ZHANG's Motion To Strike Defendant'S Memorandum Of Costs Or In The Alternative To Tax Costs GRANTED. Under the terms of the lease presented to the tenant before he took actual possession of the premises each side is to bear its own costs. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: TIM TAM VS. ANDREY STRAKHOV ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT ANDREY STRAKHOV and NATALIA BERNKHARD's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the moving party and to either bring this case by a proper plaintiff or explain the inconsistency between the allegations that Tim Tam, an individual is a co-owner and judicially noticeable documents indicating otherwise. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: 3035 BAKER I1, LLC VS. ROMAIN COLIGNOM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT ROMAIN COLIGNOM's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Hearing Required. Moving party to bring a copy of the rental application and proof of current employment at the work place indicated in the rental application.= (501/LOT)
